name: Shear
classification_notes: A single-weight display sans structured around width variants and a slant axis rather than weight variation; the geometric, upright construction with extreme condensed and expanded widths places it firmly in display territory.
summary: A 20-style display sans organised across four widths and five slant positions rather than a conventional weight range.
description: Shear forgoes the usual light-to-black weight axis in favour of four width variants — Extra Condensed, Condensed, Expanded and Extra Expanded — each available in five slant positions ranging from Backslant 40 through Neutral 0 to Slant 40. The result is a family built for headline and poster work where spatial tension and angle, not weight, carry the typographic expression. Latin and Cyrillic coverage is offered as separate licensing options.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Shear as a 20-style family priced at €70 per single style or €1,400 for the complete set, with packages available per width group. The family spans Extra Condensed, Condensed, Expanded and Extra Expanded widths, each in five slant variants from Backslant 40 to Slant 40, and is available in Latin or Latin plus Cyrillic versions.

name: Exat
classification_notes: Exat presents as a contemporary grotesque sans-serif with a strong condensed axis and a wide weight range, suggesting a workhorse display and text grotesque lineage.
summary: A 21-style grotesque from Hot Type spanning seven weights in both standard and condensed widths, suited to editorial and branding work across a wide range of sizes.
description: Twenty-one styles cover seven weights from Extra Light to Black, each available in standard and condensed widths, giving Exat considerable flexibility from small text sizes to large display settings. The condensed cuts are particularly pronounced, with the heaviest weights holding up well at headline scale. No italics are present, keeping the family focused on upright use across editorial, campaign and identity contexts.
foundry_blurb: Exat is available from Hot Type in 21 styles, priced at €70 per single style or €1,470 for the complete family. The family spans condensed and standard widths across seven weights from Extra Light to Black, with test fonts available on request.

name: Nyck
classification_notes: The specimen shows a serif family with optical size variants (S and M sizes, Text and Display cuts) and upright/italic pairs, consistent with a transitional or contemporary text serif designed for multi-size deployment.
summary: A 24-style serif family from Hot Type spanning two optical sizes and four weights, designed for continuous reading and display work across different scales.
description: Nyck offers S and M optical size grades, each with Regular, Text, Medium and Bold weights alongside matching italics, giving 24 styles in total. The optical size splits suggest careful attention to rendering at body text sizes versus larger display settings. Priced at €70 per style or €1,680 for the complete family, it sits squarely in professional text typography territory.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Nyck as a 24-style serif family available as single styles from €70 or as a complete package for €1,680, with test fonts available on request.

name: Noga
classification_notes: The letterforms shown across the specimen suggest a humanist sans construction with warm, readable proportions across a range of weights. No explicit classification is given by the foundry, but the overall character and text performance point clearly to a humanist sans-serif tradition.
summary: A ten-style humanist sans from Hot Type, spanning Light to Black with matching italics for each weight.
description: Ten styles covering five weights from Light to Black, each paired with an italic, make Noga a practical choice for editorial and branding work that needs range. The specimen shows the family holding up well across display and body sizes, with readable proportions at small text settings. No condensed cuts are offered, keeping the family tight and focused.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Noga as a complete ten-style family priced at €700 for the full set or €70 per individual style, with a 50% discount on the complete package. The family runs from Light to Black with italics throughout, licensed for desktop, social media, web and app use.

name: Crumbs
classification_notes: The family spans three distinct styles — Sans, Semi, and Serif — suggesting a humanist-influenced approach to a type system bridging sans and serif forms. The sans cut leads the classification given its prominence and the overall design language.
summary: A three-style variable type system from Hot Type, spanning Sans, Semi and Serif cuts within a single family.
description: Crumbs offers three stylistically distinct but related cuts — Sans, Semi and Serif — sold individually or as a variable font package at a discount. The system is designed to work across display and text sizes, with the sample settings running from large headlines down to body copy. The variable font format ties all three styles together, making it practical for publications or brand systems that need variation without switching typefaces.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Crumbs as a three-style family — Sans, Semi and Serif — available as individual styles at €70 each or as a variable font package. The family is shown across a range of sizes from large display down to running text, and is licensed for desktop, web, social media and app use.

name: Hot Sans
classification_notes: The page presents a clean, upright sans-serif with grotesque proportions and a neutral character, consistent with the grotesque subcategory. No serif, script, or other distinguishing features are evident.
summary: A 12-style grotesque sans from Hot Type, priced at €70 per style or €840 for the complete family.
description: Hot Sans is a clean grotesque sans-serif offered in 12 styles, spanning a range that includes at least a Thin weight. The page demonstrates its performance across display and text sizes, showing consistent rhythm and legibility from large custom settings down to 35px running text. At €840 for the complete family, it sits in the mid-range for independent foundry pricing.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Hot Sans as a 12-style family, available to try for free on Fonstand, with individual styles priced at €70 and the complete family at €840. Test fonts are available on request.

name: Punta
classification_notes: The letterforms visible in the specimen suggest a humanist sans with warm, pen-influenced proportions suited to both text and display settings across a wide weight range.
summary: A five-weight humanist sans from Hot Type with matching italics across the full range, priced at €70 per style.
description: Ten styles span Light through Black with corresponding italics, giving the family enough range for both text and display work. The specimen demonstrates readability at small sizes alongside strong presence at headline scales. At €700 for the complete family, it sits at a mid-market price point for a single-script release.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Punta as a 10-style family available for trial via Fonstand, with single styles priced at €70 and the complete family at €700, available under Desktop, Social Media, Web and App licences scaled by company size.

name: Stroy Grotesk
classification_notes: The name and specimen presentation indicate a grotesque sans-serif with a range of weights from Thin to heavier cuts, with matching italics throughout, typical of contemporary grotesque revivals.
summary: A 12-style grotesque sans from Hot Type spanning at least three weights with matching italics, available for desktop and web licensing.
description: Stroy Grotesk is a grotesque sans-serif offered in 12 styles, covering weights from Thin through to heavier cuts, each paired with an italic. The family is priced at €70 per style or €840 for the complete set, with trial fonts available via Fonstand. Its specimen suggests it performs across both display and text settings.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Stroy Grotesk as a 12-style grotesque family, available to try for free on Fonstand, with single styles at €70 and the complete family at €840.

name: Stroy Mono
classification_notes: A fixed-pitch typeface with a full weight range and matching italics, designed for both code and editorial use. The uniform character width and sans construction place it squarely in the monospaced category.
summary: A monospaced family from Hot Type spanning six weights from Thin to Black, each with a matching italic, totalling 12 styles.
description: Twelve styles cover a range from Thin to Black with upright and italic cuts across every weight, giving the family more tonal range than most monospaced releases. The even spacing and clean construction suit both code environments and editorial contexts where a fixed-pitch rhythm is wanted. Available for trial on Fonstand before purchase.
foundry_blurb: Hot Type offer Stroy Mono in 12 styles, priced at €70 per single style or €840 for the complete family, with a free trial available via Fonstand.
